description: Heuristic semantic part decomposition of OpenMoji face emojis, plus curated whole-emoji stickers and fitted wearable accessories, for Emojicle.
source: OpenMoji color SVGs; face parts derived by geometry/heuristics; stickers are whole glyphs; wearables are whole glyphs fitted onto the face by bbox.
